requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — Multi-Directive Conformity Assessment (LVD + EMC + Ecodesign)
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——多指令合格评定（低压指令 + 电磁兼容指令 + 生态设计法规）
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——多指令合格評定（低壓指令 + 電磁相容指令 + 生態設計法規）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the EU market must bear the CE marking, demonstrating conformity with all applicable EU legislation. For a standard household refrigerator, this means conformity with at minimum: (1) Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — electrical safety; (2) Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — electromagnetic compatibility; (3) Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 (Ecodesign) — energy performance requirements. If the appliance includes wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for smart-home integration), Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) also applies. CE marking is affixed by the manufacturer or EU authorised representative after completing the conformity assessment procedure (typically Module A self-declaration for LVD and EMC; Ecodesign compliance is declared in the EU DoC and supported by technical documentation). The CE mark must be visible, legible, and indelible on the product or its packaging/accompanying documents.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的家用制冷器具须加贴CE标志，以证明符合所有适用的欧盟立法。对于标准家用电冰箱，至少须符合：（1）指令2014/35/EU（低压指令）——电气安全；（2）指令2014/30/EU（电磁兼容指令）——电磁兼容性；（3）法规（EU）2019/2019（生态设计）——能效性能要求。若器具包含无线连接功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙等智能家居集成功能），指令2014/53/EU（无线设备指令）亦须遵守。CE标志由制造商或欧盟授权代表在完成合格评定程序后加贴（LVD和EMC通常采用A模块自我声明；生态设计合规在EU符合性声明中声明并以技术文件为支撑）。CE标志须在产品或其包装/随附文件上清晰可见、可读且不可擦除。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的家用製冷器具須加貼CE標誌，以證明符合所有適用的歐盟立法。對於標準家用電冰箱，至少須符合：（1）指令2014/35/EU（低壓指令）——電氣安全；（2）指令2014/30/EU（電磁相容指令）——電磁相容性；（3）法規（EU）2019/2019（生態設計）——能效性能要求。若器具包含無線連接功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙等智慧家居整合功能），指令2014/53/EU（無線設備指令）亦須遵守。CE標誌由製造商或歐盟授權代表在完成合格評定程序後加貼（LVD和EMC通常採用A模組自我聲明；生態設計合規在EU符合性聲明中聲明並以技術文件為支撐）。CE標誌須在產品或其包裝/隨附文件上清晰可見、可讀且不可擦除。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 — Ecodesign requirements for household refrigerating appliances
Decision 768/2008/EC — modular conformity assessment framework (Module A self-declaration)
Regulation (EU) 765/2008 — CE marking rules and market surveillance framework

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no single CE-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于CE的标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於CE的標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete EU conformity package from scratch — CCC and China Energy Label do not substitute for any EU requirement: (1) EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) — a manufacturer-signed legal document listing all applicable EU directives and harmonised standards applied; must be retained for 10 years; (2) Technical File — test reports to EN 60335-2-24/EN 55014-1/EN 62552, risk assessment, design drawings, circuit diagrams, BOM with materials; (3) CE marking — physical affixing on product; (4) EPREL registration — pre-market database registration; (5) EU Energy Label — A-to-G label for point-of-sale and online listings; (6) EU authorised representative — required if no EU importer (see row frigeu-market-002). The EU DoC is a manufacturer self-declaration; it cannot be outsourced to a certification body but test reports are typically generated by accredited laboratories.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的EU合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何EU要求：（1）EU符合性声明（DoC）——制造商签署的法律文件，列明所有适用的EU指令及所采用的协调标准；须保存10年；（2）技术文件——依据EN 60335-2-24/EN 55014-1/EN 62552出具的检测报告、风险评估、设计图纸、电路图、含材料信息的物料清单；（3）CE标志——在产品上实物加贴；（4）EPREL注册——市场投放前的数据库登记；（5）欧盟能效标签——销售点及在线商品列表中的A至G标签；（6）欧盟授权代表——若无EU进口商则为必要（详见frigeu-market-002行）。EU符合性声明为制造商自我声明；不能委托认证机构代为完成，但检测报告通常由认可实验室出具。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的EU合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何EU要求：（1）EU符合性聲明（DoC）——製造商簽署的法律文件，列明所有適用的EU指令及所採用的協調標準；須保存10年；（2）技術文件——依據EN 60335-2-24/EN 55014-1/EN 62552出具的檢測報告、風險評估、設計圖紙、電路圖、含材料資訊的物料清單；（3）CE標誌——在產品上實物加貼；（4）EPREL登記——市場投放前的數據庫登記；（5）歐盟能效標籤——銷售點及線上商品列表中的A至G標籤；（6）歐盟授權代表——若無EU進口商則為必要（詳見frigeu-market-002行）。EU符合性聲明為製造商自我聲明；不能委託認證機構代為完成，但檢測報告通常由認可實驗室出具。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before EU market placement; EPREL registration and EU Energy Label display are also mandatory hard gates
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking (covering LVD, EMC, and Ecodesign) is mandatory for EU market access for household refrigerators. Chinese CCC and China Energy Label are entirely separate systems — neither substitutes for CE marking, EU DoC, EPREL registration, or EU Energy Label. Manufacturers must build all EU compliance documentation independently.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】CE标志（涵盖低压指令、电磁兼容指令及生态设计）是家用电冰箱进入欧盟市场的强制要求。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度——均不能替代CE标志、EU符合性声明、EPREL注册或欧盟能效标签。制造商须独立建立所有EU合规文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】CE標誌（涵蓋低壓指令、電磁相容指令及生態設計）是家用電冰箱進入歐盟市場的強制要求。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代CE標誌、EU符合性聲明、EPREL登記或歐盟能效標籤。製造商須獨立建立所有EU合規文件。

requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟授权代表——法规（EU）2019/1020（市场监督）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟授權代表——法規（EU）2019/1020（市場監督）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 on market surveillance and product compliance requires that products placed on the EU market have an identifiable 'responsible economic operator' established in the EU. For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside the EU (including China), this means the EU importer fulfils this role — or, if no EU importer exists, the manufacturer must appoint a mandated EU Authorised Representative (AR) before the first unit reaches the EU market (Art. 4). The AR must: hold or have access to the EU Declaration of Conformity and Technical File; be named on the product label, packaging, or in the instructions; cooperate with market surveillance authorities; and take corrective action (including recall if necessary) if a product is found non-compliant. The AR obligation cannot be satisfied by a logistics provider, customs agent, or test laboratory — it must be a legally established EU entity with documented mandate.
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2019/1020关于市场监督与产品合规的规定要求，投放欧盟市场的产品须有一个在欧盟境内设立的可识别的"责任经济运营商"。对于欧盟境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，若存在欧盟进口商，则由进口商履行此职责；若不存在欧盟进口商，制造商须在首批产品进入欧盟市场前委任欧盟授权代表（AR）（第4条）。授权代表须：持有或能够访问欧盟符合性声明和技术文件；在产品标签、包装或说明书中注明；配合市场监管机构；并在产品被认定不合规时采取纠正措施（必要时包括召回）。授权代表义务不能由物流服务商、报关行或检测机构承担——须由具有书面授权的欧盟合法设立实体履行。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2019/1020關於市場監督與產品合規的規定要求，投放歐盟市場的產品須有一個在歐盟境內設立的可識別的「責任經濟運營商」。對於歐盟境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，若存在歐盟進口商，則由進口商履行此職責；若不存在歐盟進口商，製造商須在首批產品進入歐盟市場前委任歐盟授權代表（AR）（第4條）。授權代表須：持有或能夠訪問歐盟符合性聲明和技術文件；在產品標籤、包裝或說明書中注明；配合市場監管機構；並在產品被認定不合規時採取糾正措施（必要時包括召回）。授權代表義務不能由物流服務商、報關行或檢測機構承擔——須由具有書面授權的歐盟合法設立實體履行。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 4 — responsible economic operator requirement
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 8 — cooperation with market surveillance authorities

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory EU-style authorised representative obligation. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy EU market surveillance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类EU授权代表义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至欧盟市场监管要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類EU授權代表義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至歐盟市場監管要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for EU AR obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers selling directly into the EU market (e.g., via online marketplaces, cross-border e-commerce, or direct B2B supply without an EU-established importer) must appoint an EU Authorised Representative before the first shipment. The AR's name and address must appear on the product label or accompanying documentation. Without an EU AR (or EU importer), the product cannot legally be placed on the EU market under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 regardless of CE marking status. EU market surveillance authorities increasingly check for AR compliance, particularly for products sold via online platforms (reinforced by Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 on Digital Services and the Platform-to-Business Regulation).
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。直接向欧盟市场销售产品的中国电冰箱制造商（如通过在线市场、跨境电商，或在无欧盟设立进口商的情况下直接B2B供货）须在首次发货前委任欧盟授权代表。授权代表的名称和地址须出现在产品标签或随附文件上。在无欧盟授权代表（或欧盟进口商）的情况下，无论CE标志状态如何，产品均不得在法规（EU）2019/1020项下合法投放欧盟市场。欧盟市场监管机构日益加强对授权代表合规性的核查，尤其针对通过在线平台销售的产品（受法规（EU）2022/2065《数字服务法》及《平台对商业用户关系条例》强化）。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。直接向歐盟市場銷售產品的中國電冰箱製造商（如透過線上市場、跨境電商，或在無歐盟設立進口商的情況下直接B2B供貨）須在首次發貨前委任歐盟授權代表。授權代表的名稱和地址須出現在產品標籤或隨附文件上。在無歐盟授權代表（或歐盟進口商）的情況下，無論CE標誌狀態如何，產品均不得在法規（EU）2019/1020項下合法投放歐盟市場。歐盟市場監管機構日益加強對授權代表合規性的核查，尤其針對透過線上平台銷售的產品（受法規（EU）2022/2065《數字服務法》及《平台對商業用戶關係條例》強化）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU AR (or EU importer) required before any unit is placed on the EU market; no exemption for small exporters or e-commerce shipments under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint an EU AR under Chinese law

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers without an EU-established importer must appoint an EU Authorised Representative before the first unit is placed on the EU market. This is a hard legal gate under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — failure to comply exposes the manufacturer to market withdrawal orders and fines from EU national market surveillance authorities.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】没有欧盟设立进口商的中国电冰箱制造商须在首批产品投放欧盟市场前委任欧盟授权代表。这是法规（EU）2019/1020下的强制性法律门槛——不合规将使制造商面临欧盟各国市场监管机构发出的市场撤回命令和罚款。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】沒有歐盟設立進口商的中國電冰箱製造商須在首批產品投放歐盟市場前委任歐盟授權代表。這是法規（EU）2019/1020下的強制性法律門檻——不合規將使製造商面臨歐盟各國市場監管機構發出的市場撤回命令和罰款。
